view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for offer/service binding to a specific instrument version is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for offer/service binding to a specific instrument version is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates that the system binds offers to specific instrument versions, as evidenced by the linked use case which explicitly states that new bookings use the current version while old bookings retain their historical context. The evidence from the prior steps confirms that bookings are associated with the correct offer version, demonstrating that the requirement is met. Specifically, the booking evidence shows that both bookings reference the same offer version ID, indicating proper binding.
